Document:
# DENDRON-CLASS HYDROPONICS SHUTTLE
[color=#a4885c]Ship Size:[/color] Medium
[color=#a4885c]Recommended Crew:[/color] 1-3
[color=#a4885c]Power Gen Type:[/color] Uranium
# Shuttle Brief
"The Dendron is a medium-sized botany shuttle designed for cultivating, mutating and processing crops for profit."
"This vessel features 22 hydroponics trays, an industrial reagent grinder, a ChemMaster for chemical storage, a SmartFridge for produce storage and 2 plant boxes for produce transport. It also includes living quarters for crew and basic EVA and material recycling capabilities."
# Ship Functions
[textlink="Botany" link="Botany"/]
# Piloting
[textlink="Piloting" link="Piloting"/]
[textlink="Sector Topology" link="SectorTopology"/]
# Hiring crew
[textlink="Hiring" link="Hiring"/]
As a Captain of a Nanotrasen vessel, you have the authority to hire, fire, demote, or promote crew members at will.
# PREFLIGHT CHECKLIST
- Standard power consumption during operation is 36.6kW, with the generator tuned to 38kW to allow for some tolerance. - In the event of a total power outage, it is recommended to increase the generator output to 40kW to allow the substation and SMES to recharge while keeping all APCs online. - The thrusters and gyroscope can be toggled with the use of the red-framed button next to the shuttle's controls. While driving is disengaged, power consumption will be lessened, and generator output may be safely lowered to 11kW to preserve fuel.
[textlink="Preflight Checklist" link="PreflightChecklist"/]
